name: Windham Storage Cabinet with Drawer Shell - Threshold™
description:
Keep your home orderly and organized with this Windham Two-Door Cabinet with Drawers from Threshold™. This cabinet is a wonderfully versatile piece that can be used in any room in your home — whether you need a place for some of your dishes, a place to house one of your collections or somewhere for your linens, this cabinet is the perfect fit. It features two glass doors with wood accents with two interior shelves that can be adjusted to accommodate your items. This sturdy, attractive appearance of this piece will bring interest and clean lines to any room of your home. Recommend two people for assembly. Expect around one hour for assembly with easy instructions. Color swatches can be ordered for free by emailing windhamswatches@toofurniture.com, for assembly questions, please email windhamswatches@toofurniture.com.

Overall width (at floor): 30.7”

Overall height: 31”

Overall depth (at floor): 13.5”

Width of top panel: 31.7”

Depth of top panel: 14”

Width of drawer face: 28”

Height of drawer face: 4.7”

Width of drawer: 26.3”

Height of drawer: 2.5”

Depth of drawer: 11.3”

Width of door: 13.9”

Height of door: 17.4”

Width of shelf: 29.2”

Depth of shelf: 12.1”

Distance from shelf to bottom panel: 8.5”

Distance from side panel front foot to back foot: 13.5

Distance from bottom panel to floor: 6.5”

Distance between side panels: 28.2”



Maximum top panel weight: 50 lbs.

Maximum shelf weight: 45 lbs.

Maximum drawer weight: 25 lbs.
